title:
Average building costs per square metre relating to small scale buidling (residential and sheds) . 
	 - data.govt.nz
content:
## Average building costs per square metre relating to small scale buidling (residential and sheds) .
Data to provide a gross margin for the building of homes and sheds for n building costs to ensure more developers kept for building costs
The building cost per metre is a key metric for: - benchmarking efficiency in small construction projects -supporting policy and procurement analysis related to small scale building use (rural, emergency etc) - identifying regional differences and cost pressures across regions to support housing pressures nationa wide

### Response from Ministry of Business Innovation and Employment
Status Data does not exist
Comments The Ministry of Business, Innovation and Employment does not hold this information, and there are no grounds to believe the information is held by another agency or more closely connected with the functions of another agency.

#### Likely Source Agency
Ministry of Business Innovation and Employment
